rows.label: qev075204_MSG0001
rows.name:
...The Hundred Hellions' style is passed down from parent to child.
So, ever since becoming my master's adopted son,
I continued rigorous training without resting for a single day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075204_MSG0002
rows.name:
And on the day my master retired...
I inherited this sword as proof of becoming
the new Hundred Hellion![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075204_MSG0003
rows.name: I'll show you that I'm capable of much more than this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075204_MSG0004
rows.name:
So I don't bring shame to my master... no... to Grandpa,
who treated me so well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075204_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'll be waiting deep in the forest!
Let's settle this perfectly once and for all![ST:wait ]
